integration_validation_v2.gap: No kernel diagnostic-bundle manifest schema/builder exists (contract scope: src/kernel diagnostics + DCC + ModelManual); MT-112's comfy bundle is a different surface. No test maps to MT-141; CODER section PENDING with no evidence.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: grep of src/ for 'Diagnostic Bundle Schema'/'diagnostic_bundle_manifest'/'build_diagnostic_bundle' yields no MT-141 artifact (only MT-112's comfy bundle and unrelated KB003 artifact_bundle.rs); MT-141.json scope.summary; MT-141.md CODER STATUS: PENDING (no EVIDENCE/TESTS_RUN).

integration_validation_v3.evidence: src/diagnostics/bundle_manifest.rs - kernel diagnostic-bundle manifest schema 'hsk.kernel.diagnostic_bundle_manifest@1', explicitly distinct from MT-112 comfy bundle. Schema with subject_kind/subject_ref, failure_summary, error_taxonomy, severity, 6 ordered evidence section kinds, reproduction_steps, isolation_hints. Real validator (portable-ref enforcement incl. .GOV/sqlite/machine-local rejection), persistence record_kernel_diagnostic_bundle_manifest (INSERT + kernel.diagnostics.bundle_manifest_recorded event in same tx), get/list APIs. Migration 0120. Proof: tests/atelier_kernel_diagnostic_bundle_manifest_tests.rs - full-equality re-read from live PostgreSQL, re-read by failing subject, newest-first ordering, EventLedger assertions; negative test rejects .GOV ref, sqlite:// ref, missing steps/sections, proves nothing persisted.
integration_validation_v3.gap: Defense-in-depth note: inline content_json portability scan only triggers on '://', '.gov', 'sqlite' substrings; bare scheme-less machine-local paths in inline section content would pass app check. Not an acceptance-criteria breach.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-141 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Diagnostic Bundle Schema -- Define diagnostic bundle manifest schema/builder a no-context model can use to isolate failures.
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger
scope.risk_if_missed: CKC parity loss for Diagnostic Bundle Schema
